calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-14-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-14-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Discover Bank.
No appearance by defendant Ari Gluck.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on June 20, 2008.
In accordance of Civil Code of Procedure Section 98, the Declaration of Robert Atkins, Accounts Manger for plaintiff, was filed today, July 14, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, July 14, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Discover Bank, and against defendant Ari Gluck, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $2,721.29.
Prejudgment Interest - $527.25.
Attorney's Fees - $800.00.
Costs - $229.00, for a total of $4,277.54.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
